source_evidence: Eq. (7): L_{p,q} = sqrt((x_q - x_p)^2 + (y_q - y_p)^2 + (z_q - z_p)^2). 'The length of a member spanning between nodes p and q with coordinates {x_p,y_p,z_p} and {x_q,y_q,z_q}.'
purpose: Computes the Euclidean length of a truss member between two nodes in 3D; used both in ground structure generation and in the optimization formulation.
assumptions: Straight (chord) member between the two nodes

reuse_risk.explanation: Elementary, unambiguous Euclidean distance; trivially reusable.
